title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google unveiled DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a different approach and achieves up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs. The model features a 256-token canvas and includes self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion-based approach rather than standard autoregressive decoding. The shift matters because the model reaches up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs, which bears on local inference and deployment cost. Key takeaways: it uses a 256-token canvas and includes self-correction capabilities.
